PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-05-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Mario Paolini appeared in person for Marli Baumgardner and Lisa Loveridge (petitioners).

There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Lost Will and for Letters Testamentary. The lost will dated May 27, 1999 is admitted to probate. Marli Baumgardner and Lisa Loveridge are appointed as the Executors of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for October 15, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Cecilia Castellanos. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Yang. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-29-2023 Continued To Sep-05-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
